creator: dias.joaocarlos@gmail.com
text:
I installed in my i386 machine this system, and the installation went well, but when I booted the system, FreeBSD couldn't get information to the DHCP. However, during installation the installer was able to access the DHCP.

Why does the boot process include a retrieval of files from the net? I think a boot image...

By the way, I couldn't get the base-dbg during installation (checksum error)... I had not to use this package.

I used the main mirror of the FreeBSD project.
